objective: Map the tightest integration and downstream task consequences for 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
architectural_fit: Partial fit only. The scale-separation objective is valid, but a standalone independent inference layer conflicts with current authority because C45 already owns execution-mode selection, C47 already owns native model promotion, C36 owns membrane exposure, C39 owns delegated sampling semantics, and T-300 bars revival of superseded forward-authority patterns.
required_integrations: C45 must remain the route-level authority that selects NATIVE_SOVEREIGN versus LEASED_COGNITION.
C42 must remain the execution-control path when model calls become execution-capable continuations.
C47 must remain the owner of model ingestion, adaptation, quarantine, and promotion.
C36 must continue to prevent direct cross-membrane or public exposure of model-serving surfaces.
C39 should carry any required delegated sampling or backend provenance semantics instead of a parallel inference protocol.
C18 and C22 must absorb any explicit GPU pool accounting, capacity planning, and rollout sequencing.
likely_downstream_task_shapes: DIRECT_SPEC: extend C45 with backend-pool semantics, route-to-substrate binding, and capacity classes.
DIRECT_SPEC: extend C47 with promoted-model-to-serving-plane handoff semantics.
DIRECT_SPEC: extend C18 and C22 with pooled inference economics and staged capacity planning.
DIRECT_SPEC: extend C39 only if current sampling provenance is insufficient for backend-class disclosure.
Possible FULL_PIPELINE only if scope expands into a genuine cross-cutting model-capacity fabric rather than a narrow addendum.
integration_posture: Does not integrate cleanly as a new independent subsystem. It integrates more cleanly as a subordinate redesign under C45 and C47, with follow-on direct-spec work across C18, C22, and possibly C39.
evidence: C45 already distinguishes execution wrapper authority from underlying model substrate choice.
C47 already establishes the native model lane and therefore owns long-term model substrate evolution.
C22 already acknowledges separate service boundaries and staged leased/native compute operations, but not yet a first-class model-capacity control plane.
recommended_next_action: If promoted, treat the idea as an internal model-capacity and substrate-scheduling module subordinate to current authority surfaces.
